title: Low in the grave He lay
firstLine: Low in the grave He lay—
publicDomainBasis: Robert Lowry (1826–1899), Robert Lowry (1826–1899). All public domain.

sections.label: Verse 1
sections.text:
Low in the grave He lay—
Jesus my Savior!
Waiting the coming day—
Jesus my Lord!

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
Vainly they watch His bed—
Jesus, my Savior!
Vainly they seal the dead—
Jesus my Lord!

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
Death cannot keep his prey—
Jesus, my Savior!
He tore the bars away—
Jesus my Lord!
